jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Porter
jsonLd.description:
Porter invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Porter:
Porter is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
